title: UN Peacekeeper Killed As Lebanon's Last-Chance Ceasefire Collapses
script: Lebanon's president called it the last chance for a ceasefire. Hours later, a UN peacekeeper was dead. On June 4, Lebanese president Joseph Aoun announced a Washington-brokered deal with Israel. That same night, a Serbian UNIFIL peacekeeper died in a mortar strike near Marjayoun — fire that UN officials say came from Hezbollah. That brings 7 peacekeepers killed since March. Hezbollah then rejected any deal that doesn't begin with Israel pulling out of south Lebanon.
